message:
fix(lab): create obligation before quiescence in crashpack/spork tests

The holder task validation in create_obligation (added in fa541c49)
now rejects tasks that have already completed and been removed from
state. These 5 tests intentionally leak obligations to trigger failure
reports, so the obligation must be created while the task is still
live. Also set panic_on_leak(false) so the runtime logs the leak
instead of panicking during run_until_quiescent.

Fixes: contract_auto_crashpack_on_failure,
contract_auto_crashpack_contains_divergent_prefix_when_replay_enabled,
contract_manual_crashpack_not_duplicated_on_failure,
summarize_spork_reports_links_failures_to_crashpacks,
explore_spork_seed_space_is_deterministic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
